title: Recover deleted item

posts.author: yamini (Yamini Bhola)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I know we can recover deleted items within 30 days, what if user is out of office or not paying attention every day when the board gets big. I do not see any way to recover the deleted items.

What are you trying to achieve

There should be a way to make board as critical Board and not even owner should be able to delete the item, he/she should be able to hide from the Main Table.
